title: HCSL Nursing Assistant Cum First Aider Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Hooghly Cochin Shipyard Limited (HCSL) has published the Nursing Assistant Cum First Aider Notification 2026 on 20 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Nursing Assistant Cum First Aider position. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 30 years and holding VII Standard pass, Valid First Aid Certificate from any Recognized Institution, VHSE Domestic Nursing, or General Duty Assistant QP No. HSS/Q5101 NSQF Level 4 qualification are eligible to apply online at Cochin Shipyard Limited Official Website. The application process will be active from 20 May 2026 to 09 June 2026, and candidates

basic_details.job_title: HCSL Nursing Assistant Cum First Aider Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Hooghly Cochin Shipyard Limited (HCSL) has published the Nursing Assistant Cum First Aider Notification 2026 on 20 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Nursing Assistant Cum First Aider position. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 30 years and holding VII Standard pass, Valid First Aid Certificate from any Recognized Institution, VHSE Domestic Nursing, or General Duty Assistant QP No. HSS/Q5101 NSQF Level 4 qualification are eligible to apply online at Cochin Shipyard Limited Official Website. The application process will be active from 20 May 2026 to 09 June 2026, and candidates

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation for Ex-Servicemen & Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) shall not exceed 40 years as per Government of India guidelines.

qualification.education_qualification: VII Standard pass, Valid First Aid Certificate from any Recognized Institutions, VHSE Domestic Nursing, General Duty
qualification.details: Essential: VII Standard pass OR Valid First Aid Certificate from any Recognized Institutions OR VHSE Domestic Nursing OR General Duty Assistant QP No. HSS/Q5101 NSQF Level 4. Desirable: Adequate knowledge of Bengali. Candidates with work experience as Nursing Assistant/First Aider. Ex-Servicemen with valid first aid certificate are also eligible.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Nursing Assistant Cum First Aider on contract basis

selection_process: Objective type written test Practical test Certificate Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of HCSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the HCSL Nursing Assistant-Cum-First Aider recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the HCSL Nursing Assistant-Cum-First Aider posts is 09 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed VII Standard or possess a Valid First Aid Certificate from a recognized institution, or have VHSE Domestic Nursing, or General Duty Assistant QP No. HSS/Q5101 NSQF Level 4.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Nursing Assistant-Cum-First Aider position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 30 years. Age relaxation is applicable for Ex-Servicemen and Persons with Benchmark Disabilities as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Nursing Assistant-Cum-First Aider post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Nursing Assistant-Cum-First Aider post on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 300/-. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidate?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from ₹ 22,100/- in the first year to ₹ 23,400/- in the third year per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an objective type written test, followed by a practical test, and finally, certificate verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any relaxation in the age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided for Ex-Servicemen and Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD), not exceeding 40 years, in accordance with Government of India guidelines.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to visit the official HCSL website to fill out and submit their application forms.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the direct links to the official notification PDF and the online application portal in the "Important Links" section of this article.
